resources.string: Allow other devices to control your phone using virtual touch, when RustDesk screen sharing is established
Keeps the RustDesk remote desktop host available for authorized unattended connections and foreground notifications without starting screen capture before user approval.

RustDesk requests access to all files so its remote file transfer and file management features can work with files and folders across this device. During an authorized remote session, a connected user may browse, send, receive, create, rename, and delete files. Continue to Android settings to grant access. You can deny or revoke this access at any time.
